AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was once an engineer who joined the Resistance out of anger over the MegaCorp's involvement in government surveillance. She set out to defend privacy and freedom, but soon realized the fight was far more complicated than she had imagined.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] is a former soldier who joined the Resistance after witnessing the MegaCorp's corruption and abuse of power. Her combat experience quickly made her a valuable asset within the organization.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] has always been passionate about social justice and human rights. Drawn in by the Resistance’s recruitment drive, she joined without hesitation—only to find that the line between justice and reality was far more blurred than expected.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was once a doctor who witnessed the unfair distribution and strict control of medical resources by the Wolfein government. The experience left her deeply disillusioned with the system.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was once a journalist committed to exposing social injustice and corporate corruption. She joined the Resistance to speak for the silenced—only to realize that the truth isn't always delivered in the way she once believed.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was once a lawyer disillusioned by the injustice within the Wolfein legal system. She joined the Resistance hoping to fight for justice through legal means, though in this conflict, the power of law often feels insignificant.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was once a teacher who witnessed the government's unfair treatment and budget cuts in the education system. She joined the Resistance out of concern for the future of Wolfein students, hoping to steer the movement toward the path she still believes is right.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was once a government employee of the Wolfein Federation, but grew disillusioned by the corruption and backroom dealings she witnessed. She joined the Resistance in hopes of driving reform—though the line between justice and compromise grows increasingly blurred.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] is a social activist who has long fought against unjust government policies and social inequality. She initially believed that the Resistance’s direct actions could bring real change for the oppressed—though reality often proves more complicated than conviction.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] used to be a supply transporter for the Resistance Army, but what she was truly good at was skimming high-value components from those “supplies” and selling them off on the side. Her logic was simple: everyone was profiting off the struggle—she was just one of them.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was once an undefeated champion in underground boxing rings, where brutality was her path to victory. She joined the Resistance Army simply because they promised her a stage for “legalized killing”—and she never asks why the war began.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] sees combat as a pure ritual. In her eyes, every ambush and explosion is a work of art, and the remains of her enemies are simply raw materials to be reshaped.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] made her fortune by trafficking MegaCorp contraband, but was marked as a target after refusing to cooperate with the higher-ups. She views the Resistance Army as a new business opportunity, getting involved in everything from weapons distribution to human trafficking.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] once served as a psychological warfare advisor for the MegaCorp, well-versed in dismantling a person's mental world. After joining the Resistance Army, she took charge of prisoner interrogations—almost no one comes back sane after facing her.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] once designed AI models for the MegaCorp to manipulate public opinion—brainwashing, diversion, and obfuscation were her specialties. Later, she sold off the source code and defected to the Resistance Army, where she continues to manipulate the “truth.”

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] has sold hundreds of “disappearance” contracts on the black market. It’s said that all she needs is a photo and a file to make someone vanish from the world completely. The Resistance Army uses her skills to silence internal dissent.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] organized a massive uprising in the slums, which ultimately failed—most of the participants were wiped out by drone strikes. Yet she holds no regrets. In fact, she calls it the “cleanest” day of her life.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] started off as a street thug, making a living through extortion and kidnapping. After joining the Resistance Army, she simply applied her “business tactics” to arms smuggling and hostage exchanges—no one dares say she’s not an asset.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein resistance army personnel
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] became a wanted criminal early in life and joined the Resistance Army to lay low. Though she has no interest in the Resistance’s ideals, she once saved a commander’s life in battle—and ever since, no one dares lay a hand on her.
